request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we've been through worse. Our allies have our backs, and our military is stronger than ever. The real threat isn't some distant enemy, it's the chaos that comes when we panic and turn on each other. We need steady leadership, not fearmongering. #NationalSecurity #StrongAllies
